questions.question: How much of the year does the prohibition of gas leaf blowers last? What date in the year does it start, and what date does it end?
questions.answer: According to the provided source, the prohibition of gas-powered leaf blowers in White Plains is year-round. No specific start or end dates are mentioned because the ban applies continuously throughout the entire year. The source states that gas-powered backpack, handheld, ride-on, and push-behind leaf blowers 'can no longer be used in White Plains year-round.'
questions.gap: White Plains exceeds the best practice seasonal approach by implementing a full year-round ban, which is actually more restrictive than the best practice model. However, the best practice also recommends specific enforcement mechanisms and operating hour restrictions in residential areas, which are not addressed in the provided sources.
nextPrompts: Does White Plains have specific penalties or enforcement mechanisms for violations of the gas leaf blower prohibition?
